channel.title: AI & Tech Daily
channel.description: Latest in AI, business and media

item.title: OpenAI Releases New Reasoning Model
item.description: OpenAI has launched a new model focused on step-by-step reasoning and chain-of-thought capabilities.
item.author: techcrunch@example.com

item.title: The Economics of Foundation Models
item.description: Deep analysis on the business models behind large AI models and their monetization strategies.
item.author: stratechery@example.com

item.title: Anthropic Raises $1.5B for Safety Research
item.description: Anthropic secures major funding round to advance AI safety and alignment research.
item.author: techcrunch@example.com

item.title: The Rise of AI-Generated Media
item.description: How generative AI is transforming film, music, and digital art creation workflows.
item.author: theverge@example.com

item.title: Why Strategy Still Matters in the AI Era
item.description: Even with powerful models, strategic thinking and business judgment remain critical.
item.author: stratechery@example.com

item.title: OpenAI Releases New Reasoning Model
item.description: OpenAI has launched a new model focused on step-by-step reasoning and chain-of-thought capabilities.
item.author: techcrunch@example.com

item.title: The Future of Work in an AI World
item.author: nytimes@example.com
